# Changelog

> Entries older than 60 days are pruned during dream consolidation.

| Date | Author | Change |
|------|--------|--------|
| 2026-04-27 | dev | Fixed bootstrap Azure DevOps pipeline creation on Windows PowerShell 5.1: `BootstrapPipelineGenerationEngine` now emits a guarded `az pipelines create` call that temporarily switches to `Continue`, captures `LASTEXITCODE`, filters on numeric pipeline IDs, and passes `--only-show-errors` so Azure CLI success warnings on `stderr` no longer abort the step with `NativeCommandError`. Added new test project `tests/InfraFlowSculptor.PipelineGeneration.Tests/` with a focused regression test, added it to `InfraFlowSculptor.slnx`, updated `.github/test-debt.md`, refreshed `10-auth-and-build.md`, and incremented `dream-state.md` session counter. |
| 2026-04-27 | copilot | Rewrote `docs/architecture/bicep-generation.md` into a full onboarding guide for the refactored Bicep engine: end-to-end flow, pipeline stages, Builder + IR, assemblers, mono-repo behavior, design decisions, debugging entry points, .csproj navigation, and step-by-step code-reading path. Updated `docs/README.md`, refreshed `07-bicep-generation.md`, and incremented `dream-state.md` session counter. |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **BicepOutputPruner now 100% regex-free.** Replaced regex-based discovery in `IrOutputPruningStage.CollectUsedOutputsByPath` with a track-as-you-emit approach. New `OutputUsageTracker` (case-insensitive) instrumented in `MainBicepAssembler.Generate` (return type now `MainBicepEmissionResult` record) at all 11 `xxxModule.outputs.YYY` emission sites, plus `RoleAssignmentAssembler.ResolvePrincipalIdExpression` (both UA/SA branches). New `GenerationResult.UsedOutputsByModulePath` propagated to `IrOutputPruningStage` + `IrMonoRepoOutputPruner` (now 0 regex). 8 new `MainBicepAssemblerOutputTrackingTests`. 810/810 tests pass. TDD RED→GREEN→REFACTOR→VERIFY. |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **BicepOutputPruner → IR pipeline stage (hybrid).** Replaced text-based `BicepOutputPruner` with new `IrOutputPruningStage` (Order 950) that filters `BicepModuleSpec.Outputs` and re-emits modules via `BicepEmitter`. Mono-repo handled by new `IrMonoRepoOutputPruner` post-assembly. Added `BicepGenerationContext.SkipOutputPruning` flag (set true during per-config mono-repo runs). Discovery of consumed outputs **still uses the legacy regex** in `BicepAssembler` (kept as-is for parity safety; only the removal regex is gone). Deleted: `TextManipulation/BicepOutputPruner.cs`, `BicepAssembler.PruneUnusedOutputs`, 4 obsolete pruner tests. Added: 8 `IrOutputPruningStageTests`. 802 tests pass (798 baseline + 8 − 4). TDD RED→GREEN→REFACTOR→VERIFY followed. |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **TDD workflow implemented.** Created `tdd-workflow` skill (`.github/skills/tdd-workflow/SKILL.md`) enforcing RED→GREEN→REFACTOR→VERIFY cycle for all code modifications. Created test debt tracker (`.github/test-debt.md`) with initial 6 P1-P3 entries for uncovered assemblies. Updated `dotnet-dev` agent (protocol step 6 + checklist + end-of-task). Updated `angular-front` agent (end-of-task TDD/debt steps). Updated `dev` agent (routing table, delegation rules, skills section, end-of-task protocol). Registered `tdd-workflow` in `copilot-instructions.md` skills table + pitfall #11. Updated `11-agents-skills.md` unit test routing. |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Phase 0.9 review remediation.** Fixed MEDIUM-003: `EmitImports`/`EmitParameters` → `static`. Fixed MEDIUM-004: XML docs on `IResourceTypeBicepGenerator` interface. Fixed LOW-001: removed dead `customize` param from `BicepEmitterTests.MinimalSpec`. Added 9 emitter tests (ExistingResource, Condition, ForLoop, ParentSymbol, Scope, AdditionalResources, output description, multi-type EmitTypes) + 5 builder tests (ModuleFileName, ExistingResource, Parent, AdditionalResource, Build-without-Module). 798 tests total. |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Phase 6.5 review remediation.** Fixed HIGH-001: Container App `envVars` param now wired into `properties.template.containers[0].env` (was add-param-only stub from Phase 0). Fixed MEDIUM-003: replaced 3 magic ARM strings in `ParentReferenceResolutionStage` with `AzureResourceTypes.ArmTypes.*`. Fixed MEDIUM-004: `OutputTransformer.ExtractRootSymbol` now skips root-symbol filtering for function-call expressions (`listKeys(...)` etc). Fixed LOW-005/006: removed unused `using System.Collections.Immutable` in `BicepExpression.cs` and unnecessary `!` in `ModuleBuildStage`. 4 new tests (785 total). |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Phase 6 Finalisation — Legacy cleanup.** Removed all dual-mode (IR/text) branches from 5 stages (IdentityInjection, OutputInjection, AppSettingsInjection, TagsInjection, SpecEmission). Made `ModuleWorkItem.Spec` required (non-nullable). Updated `ModuleBuildStage` constructor to take `IResourceTypeBicepSpecGenerator` only. Updated DI registrations (18 generators as `IResourceTypeBicepSpecGenerator`). Updated Application-layer references (SecureParameterOverrideHelper, GeneratePipelineCommandHandler, GenerateProjectPipelineCommandHandler). Deleted 5 dead TextManipulation injectors (kept BicepOutputPruner), 5 corresponding test files, and `ResourceGeneratorFactory.cs`. Rewrote 5 stage test files to use spec-based assertions instead of legacy text assertions. Cleaned up XML doc references. 781 tests, 0 failures. |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Migration 5.2 — StorageAccount → Builder+IR.** Primary module migrated (8 params, 4 custom types, identity baked in, 6 outputs, 4 exported types). 3 companion modules (Blobs, Queues, Tables) remain in legacy `Generate()` — too coupled to assembler metadata. `ModuleBuildStage` fixed to preserve `CompanionModules` + `ParameterGroupMappings` from legacy `Generate()` when IR path is taken. 42 new tests (842 total). **All 18 generators migrated — Tier 5 complete.** |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Migration 5.1 — ContainerApp → Builder+IR.** First Tier 5 generator. 3 variants (NoAcr/AcrMI/AcrAdmin), 6 exported types incl. 4 object types via multi-line `BicepRawExpression`, for-loop in `Var` via raw expression, `union()` probes block as static helper. 14 ParameterGroupMappings preserved in legacy `Generate()`. 54 new tests (800 total). |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Migration 4.2 — FunctionApp → Builder+IR.** Second Tier 4 variant-based generator. Same 3-variant pattern as WebApp but with `workerRuntime` var + `appSettings` (FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME/EXTENSION_VERSION) in all variants, `kind` always present, 3 exported types. 74 new tests (746 total). **Tier 4 complete.** |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Migration 4.1 — WebApp → Builder+IR.** First Tier 4 variant-based generator (3 deployment modes: Code/ContainerMI/ContainerAdmin). IR extended: `BicepForLoop` on resources, `ModuleFileName` on spec. ForLoop emitter for `[for x in xs: {...}]`. Conditional branches in single GenerateSpec. 71 new tests (672 total). |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Migration 3.6 — ContainerAppEnvironment → Builder+IR.** IR extended: `Condition`/`Scope` on `BicepResourceDeclaration`, `AdditionalResources` on `BicepModuleSpec`, `AdditionalResource()` on builder, emitter rewrite for conditional resources with scope. Inline conditional with object/null, custom type import, workload profiles array. 44 new tests (601 total). **Tier 3 complete.** |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Migration 3.5 — RedisCache → Builder+IR.** First generator with `BicepType.Int` outputs + quoted property key `'aad-enabled'`. Conditional bool→string pattern. 43 new tests (557 total). |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Migration 3.4 — CosmosDb → Builder+IR.** First generator with `BicepType.Array` param + `BicepArrayExpression([])` default. Deeply nested properties (consistencyPolicy, backupPolicy, locations array with nested object). 40 new tests (514 total). |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Migration 3.3 — SqlDatabase → Builder+IR.** First generator requiring IR extension: added `BicepExistingResource`, `ExistingResources` on spec, `ParentSymbol` on resource declaration, emitter+builder support. Existing resource + parent ref pattern. 33 new tests (474 total). |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Migration 3.2 — SqlServer → Builder+IR.** First generator with `@secure()` param, static const template, `publicNetworkAccess` string literal, `NormalizeSqlServerVersion()` in legacy only. 30 new tests (441 total). |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Migration 3.1 — KeyVault → Builder+IR.** First generator with dynamic `resource.Properties` injection (6 booleans as `BicepBoolLiteral`), `subscription().tenantId` raw expression, nested sku inside properties. 29 new tests (411 total). |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Migration 2.4 — EventHubNamespace → Builder+IR.** Sku name+tier reusing same param, conditional `maximumThroughputUnits` ternary, property-to-param name mismatches. 31 new tests (383 total). **Tier 2 complete (4/4).** |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Migration 2.3 — ApplicationInsights → Builder+IR.** Top-level `kind: 'web'` literal, PascalCase property keys, cross-resource `logAnalyticsWorkspaceId` param, 3 outputs. 29 new tests (352 total). |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Migration 2.2 — AppConfiguration → Builder+IR.** Simplest Tier 2 generator. Simple sku, `.properties.endpoint` output, 2 custom types. 27 new tests (323 total). |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Migration 2.1 — ServiceBusNamespace → Builder+IR.** First Tier 2 generator. `listKeys()` output via `BicepRawExpression`, param reuse (`sku.tier: sku`), inline ternary in nested object. 28 new tests (296 total). |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Migration 1.4 — ContainerRegistry → Builder+IR.** Inline `BicepConditionalExpression` in resource body, `BicepBoolLiteral` defaults, 2 custom types. Tier 1 complete (4/4 generators). 27 new tests (268 total). |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Migration 1.3 — AppServicePlan → Builder+IR.** First generator with variables (`Var()`), `BicepConditionalExpression`, 2 imports, 2 custom types. Fixed `ModuleBuildStage` to preserve `Parameters` dict from legacy `Generate()`. 27 new tests (241 total). |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Migration 1.2 — LogAnalyticsWorkspace → Builder+IR.** First generator with `types.bicep` (SkuName exported type), custom param type, nested object properties, default values. 22 new tests (215 total). |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Migration 1.1 — UserAssignedIdentity → Builder+IR.** Generator implements `IResourceTypeBicepSpecGenerator`, `GenerateSpec()` builds `BicepModuleSpec` via `BicepModuleBuilder`. Legacy `Generate()` kept for backward compat. 18 new tests (193 total). No DI change needed. |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Phase 0 IR infrastructure complete.** Created 19 new files: 9 IR model records, 2 builders, 1 emitter, 4 transformers, 1 adapter, 1 interface, 1 stage. Modified 6 existing files: `ModuleWorkItem.Spec`, `ModuleBuildStage` (IR detect), stages 400-700 (dual-mode), DI registration (SpecEmissionStage). 51 new unit tests (175 total). Tracker updated. |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | Created `bicep-v2-migration` skill (`.github/skills/bicep-v2-migration/SKILL.md`) with the 7-step migration workflow per generator (analyse → TDD → migration → parité → pipeline → review → maj skill), Phase 0 infra IR requirements, pitfalls, and feedback loop. Created migration tracker at `docs/architecture/bicep-refactoring/MIGRATION-TRACKER.md` with 6 phases (0: Infra IR, 1-5: generators by complexity tier, 6: cleanup), 18 generators ordered simplest→complex, 159 total steps tracked. Registered the skill in `copilot-instructions.md` and `dev.agent.md`. |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | Created 124 unit tests for the Vague 1 Bicep pipeline refactoring across 16 test files under `tests/InfraFlowSculptor.BicepGeneration.Tests/` (TextManipulation helpers + Pipeline orchestration + 9 stages). Added `GlobalUsings.cs` for xUnit, `InternalsVisibleTo` for internal helpers, FluentAssertions + NSubstitute packages. All 124 tests green, full solution build clean. |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | Added the `review-main` workspace prompt to standardize strict diff reviews against `main`, and added the `review-remediator` agent to consume approved review backlogs and implement validated corrective actions. |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | Added the `review-expert` agent for strict pre-merge reviews of the current branch diff against `main`, with severity-ranked findings, explicit risk rationale, and a corrective backlog ready to hand off for implementation. |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | Vague 1 — Refactored `BicepGenerationEngine` (~920 LOC God Object) into a thin facade (~85 LOC) driven by `BicepGenerationPipeline` over 9 ordered `IBicepGenerationStage` instances (`IdentityAnalysis`, `AppSettingsAnalysis`, `ModuleBuild`, `IdentityInjection`, `OutputInjection`, `AppSettingsInjection`, `TagsInjection`, `ParentReferenceResolution`, `Assembly`). Extracted text-manipulation primitives into `TextManipulation/` (`BicepTextManipulationHelpers`, `BicepIdentityInjector`, `BicepOutputInjector`, `BicepAppSettingsInjector`, `BicepTagsInjector`, `BicepOutputPruner`). Added `AzureResourceTypes.ComputeArmTypes` to remove magic ARM strings. Wired stages + pipeline in `Application/DependencyInjection.cs`. Public surface (`BicepGenerationEngine.Generate` / `GenerateMonoRepo`) preserved — handlers untouched. Scaffolded empty `tests/InfraFlowSculptor.BicepGeneration.Tests/` test csproj per `xunit-unit-testing` skill (no test code yet). Build clean (0 errors). |
| 2026-04-27 | copilot | Replaced the repository MIT license with PolyForm Noncommercial 1.0.0 and updated the README to state that public source access remains noncommercial unless covered by a separate commercial agreement. |
| 2026-04-27 | copilot | Removed the existing `InfraFlowSculptor.GenerationParity.Tests` `.csproj`, detached it from `InfraFlowSculptor.slnx`, kept the folder, and updated test instructions/memory to reflect a zero-project .NET test baseline. |
| 2026-04-27 | copilot | Added the `xunit-unit-testing` skill, routed xUnit work through `dev` and `dotnet-dev`, and documented the repo-wide unit-test placement and execution conventions under `tests/`. |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | Added architecture audit docs under `docs/architecture/bicep-refactoring/` to capture the current Bicep-generation pain points and the proposed refactoring paths (Pipeline, Builder + IR, Visitor). |
| 2026-04-26 | dev | Fixed DockerfilePickerComponent invisibility on the App Pipeline tab: the picker trigger button used white-on-white styling (border `rgba(255,255,255,0.2)`, bg `rgba(255,255,255,0.06)`, color `rgba(255,255,255,0.7)`) inherited from a dark-theme draft, but the resource-edit form uses a light translucent surface (`rgba(255,255,255,0.84)`), making the icon button essentially invisible next to the dockerfile path text field. Rewrote `dockerfile-picker.component.scss` to use the brand palette (`#0d65c0`) for the trigger and a light surface for the overlay panel so it matches the rest of the resource-edit form. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build` (success). |
| 2026-04-26 | dev | Restored the missing `POST /projects/with-setup` registration in `ProjectController`, which the Angular create-project wizard calls on the review step. The handler, contract, and Mapster mapping were still present; the runtime failure came from the Minimal API route no longer being mapped. Validation: `dotnet build .\src\Api\InfraFlowSculptor.Api\InfraFlowSculptor.Api.csproj -p:BaseOutputPath=.\tmp\api-build\` (success; isolated output used because a running `InfraFlowSculptor.Api.exe` locked the default `bin\Debug` files). |
| 2026-04-26 | dev | Infra pipeline wrapper generation now emits an explicit root-level `pool` in config CI/PR/Release wrappers (`PipelineGenerationEngine`) so Azure DevOps definition creation no longer falls back to the project default hosted queue while validating nested templates. Updated parity goldens accordingly. Validation: `dotnet test .\tests\InfraFlowSculptor.GenerationParity.Tests\InfraFlowSculptor.GenerationParity.Tests.csproj`, `dotnet build .\src\Api\InfraFlowSculptor.PipelineGeneration\InfraFlowSculptor.PipelineGeneration.csproj`. |
| 2026-04-26 | dev | Fixed project bootstrap variable-group generation for Key Vault app settings assigned `ViaBicepparam`: `GenerateProjectBootstrapPipelineCommandHandler` now classifies those pipeline variables as secrets, so groups like `ifs-backend` are bootstrapped with a placeholder plus secret `jwt-secret` instead of invalid plain `--value ''`. Validation: `dotnet build .\src\Api\InfraFlowSculptor.Application\InfraFlowSculptor.Application.csproj`, `dotnet build .\InfraFlowSculptor.slnx`. |
| 2026-04-26 | dev | Refactored the create-project wizard modal layout: moved action buttons (Back/Next/Submit) out of `<mat-step>` into a single `<footer class="wizard__footer">` outside the stepper. Navigation now uses `MatStepper.next()`/`previous()` instead of hidden `matStepperNext`/`matStepperPrevious` buttons. This fixes: (1) scroll now only applies to step content, buttons always visible at bottom, (2) no white background behind buttons, (3) reduced bottom margin, (4) proper gap between content and footer separator. Added `activeStepIndex` signal, `isCurrentStepValid` computed, and `StepperSelectionEvent` handler. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build` (success). |
| 2026-04-26 | dev | SplitInfraCode bootstrap output paths now align between preview tree, merged ZIP downloads, and Git push. Added shared frontend helper `project-generated-artifact-paths.ts` so split ZIP assembly and bootstrap tree reuse one normalization rule: bootstrap files are repo-relative under `.azuredevops/` instead of appearing at ZIP root. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build`. |
| 2026-04-26 | dev | Bootstrap pipeline diagnostics now keep the raw `az pipelines create` output and explicitly mention missing `Use` permission on the target agent pool when definition creation fails. The generated header prerequisites also now call out pool-use permission. Validation: `dotnet test .\tests\InfraFlowSculptor.GenerationParity.Tests\InfraFlowSculptor.GenerationParity.Tests.csproj`. |
| 2026-04-26 | dev | SplitInfraCode section actions now follow repository scope end-to-end: the green download CTA merges section-specific artifacts into repo-scoped ZIPs (`infra = bicep + infra pipeline + infra bootstrap`, `code = app pipeline + app bootstrap`) by filtering the union pipeline/bootstrap archives client-side with JSZip, and `PushProjectArtifactsToMultiRepoCommandHandler` now also includes the app bootstrap bucket in code-repo pushes. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build`, `dotnet build .\src\Api\InfraFlowSculptor.Application\InfraFlowSculptor.Application.csproj`. |
| 2026-04-26 | dev | Fixed DockerfilePickerComponent visibility: removed `@if (config()?.projectId)` conditional wrapper in resource-edit template (likely prevented rendering due to signal timing inside lazy mat-tab), made `projectId` input optional with internal `isDisabled` computed guard instead. Picker now always renders when container mode is active and self-disables when no projectId is available. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build` (success). |
| 2026-04-26 | dev | Dockerfile path picker feature: `IGitProviderService.SearchFilesAsync` (GitHub/ADO), `ListCodeRepoBranchesQuery` + `SearchCodeRepoFilesQuery` (code-repo routing via `ArtifactKind.ApplicationPipeline`), 2 new endpoints (`GET /projects/{id}/git-config/code-branches`, `GET /projects/{id}/git-config/code-files`), `DockerfilePickerComponent` (standalone, signal-based, cdkConnectedOverlay), integrated in resource-edit App Pipeline tab for ContainerApp/WebApp/FunctionApp, 6 i18n keys FR/EN. |
| 2026-04-26 | dev | Fixed SplitInfraCode multi-repo push: `PushProjectArtifactsToMultiRepoCommandHandler` now uses bucket-aware bootstrap loading (`infra/` prefix filter) so only the infra bootstrap file is pushed to the infra repo. Also prefixes the loaded path with `.azuredevops/` so `BuildPushRequest` root-scope splitting places the file at `.azuredevops/bootstrap.pipeline.yml` instead of repo root (PipelineBasePath is always null for project repos). |
| 2026-04-26 | dev | Redesigned the create-project wizard review (step 5): replaced broken `material-symbols-outlined` span with `<mat-icon>` to fix `inventory_2` showing as text, added card-style section backgrounds/borders using DS tokens, and made the wizard footer buttons (Back/Submit) sticky at the bottom of the modal by restructuring the Material stepper layout into a flex column with the content container scrolling independently. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build` (success; existing warnings unchanged). |
| 2026-04-26 | dev | Refined the create-project wizard step-2 UI after a full code pass over the dialog, step components, DS option-card usage, and Material stepper styles. The wizard now applies local Material stepper hover/focus state-layer variables plus header rail padding so breadcrumb hover/focus no longer paints a large block against the top/bottom edges, and the three layout preset cards are equalized locally inside `layout-step` without altering the shared `app-ds-option-card` behavior elsewhere. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build` (success; existing frontend budget/OpenTelemetry warnings unchanged). |
| 2026-04-26 | dev | `config-detail` now gates its config-level `Generate` and `Push to Git` actions, plus the generation panel itself, behind the true `MultiRepo` project preset. `AllInOne` and `SplitInfraCode` therefore keep generation/push entry points only at `project-detail`. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build` (success; existing frontend budget/OpenTelemetry warnings unchanged). |
| 2026-04-26 | dev | **Generic module params (AVM-style).** Replaced per-project UAI param names (`userAssignedIdentityBackendId`, `userAssignedIdentityFrontendId`, …) with a single generic `userAssignedIdentityId` across `InjectUserAssignedIdentity`, `InjectParameterizedIdentity`, and `MainBicepAssembler`. Modules are now project-agnostic and reusable across projects. Removed `differingUaiArmTypes` workaround (no longer needed since all UAI-bearing resources naturally produce identical module content). `computeArmTypesWithAppSettings` logic from previous session still applies for `envVars`/`appSettings` uniformity. Validation: `dotnet build BicepGeneration.csproj` (0 errors), parity tests 4/4 pass. |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | Bicep generation now reuses a single module file across same-typed resources that diverge only by their UAI param names or by whether they declare app-settings/`envVars`. `BicepGenerationEngine.GenerateCore` now also flags an ARM type as parameterized-identity when its resources require **different** UAI sets (in addition to mixed identity kinds), and injects the `appSettings`/`envVars` param into every compute resource of an ARM type as soon as **any** resource of that type has app settings. `InjectParameterizedIdentity` now builds the `userAssignedIdentities` map via `union(!empty(<param>) ? { '${<param>}': {} } : {}, …)` so instances that don't use a given UAI safely skip its empty entry. Result: two ACA instances using two different UAIs share `containerApp.module.bicep` instead of producing two hashed `containerAppAcrManagedIdentity.{hash}.module.bicep` files. Validation: `dotnet build .\InfraFlowSculptor.slnx` (0 errors), `dotnet test tests\InfraFlowSculptor.GenerationParity.Tests` (4/4 pass — fixtures don't include ContainerApp scenarios). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | Project-level Git pushes now split root-level generated artifacts into per-folder scopes before calling the multi-scope Git providers. This preserves the existing file paths but restores safe cleanup for `Common/`, config folders, `.azuredevops/`, `infra/`, and `app/`, which prevents stale legacy files like an old `Infra-Flow-Sculptor/release.pipeline.yml` from surviving after SplitInfraCode project pushes. Validation: `dotnet build .\src\Api\InfraFlowSculptor.Application\InfraFlowSculptor.Application.csproj` (passes; 2 pre-existing nullable warnings remain in `PushProjectArtifactsToMultiRepoCommandHandler`). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | Simplified the `SplitInfraCode` multi-repo Git push dialog after the first visual pass: removed the blue top hero/band, removed the colored top accent on the repo card, and reduced the shell to a neutral dialog containing only the repo card content plus validation/cancel actions. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build` (existing frontend budget / OpenTelemetry warnings unchanged). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | `SplitInfraCode` bootstrap preview is now correctly separated in the frontend: the Infra side renders only `infraFileUris`, the Code side renders only `appFileUris`, and the viewer preserves `infra/` / `app/` prefixes when loading file content so each tab reads the right blob bucket. The code side also gained a dedicated `Bootstrap (App)` tab with concise setup/usage guidance. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, targeted IDE error scan on edited frontend files, `gitnexus_detect_changes` (`low`, no affected processes). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | Polished the create-project wizard visuals after first rollout: step 2 (`layout-step`) now renders preset icons through `MatIconModule` / `<mat-icon>` instead of raw `material-symbols-outlined` text spans, fixing the fallback where icon names appeared in the cards. The preset cards were rebalanced into a responsive equal-height grid with roomier spacing and a more stable desktop fit. The modal was enlarged from `720px` to `960px` with `maxWidth: 96vw`, and `.ifs-wizard-dialog` now adds scoped stepper-header spacing/wrapping so step labels breathe better. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build` (0 errors; only pre-existing frontend budget / OpenTelemetry warnings). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | The `SplitInfraCode` multi-repo Git push dialog was visually rebuilt to match the frontend design-system baseline: branded hero header, tokenized repo cards, mode-aware dialog widths (`38rem` single / `68rem` dual) and a dedicated `ifs-multi-repo-push-dialog` panel class to eliminate the strange stretched layout and horizontal overflow seen in infra/code single-mode pushes. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build`, `gitnexus_detect_changes` (`low`, no affected processes). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | New project creation wizard V1: replaces the single-screen dialog with a 4/5-step Material stepper (Identity → Layout → Environments → Repositories[skipped on MultiRepo] → Review) backed by a new atomic backend endpoint `POST /projects/with-setup` (handler `CreateProjectWithSetupCommandHandler`, contract `CreateProjectWithSetupRequest` with nested `EnvironmentSetupRequest`/`RepositorySetupRequest`, Mapster mapping in `ProjectMappingConfig`). Repository connection details (`ProviderType`/`RepositoryUrl`/`DefaultBranch`) and environment `SubscriptionId` are all optional ("configure later" pattern; backend uses `Guid.Empty` sentinel for missing subscription, all-or-nothing rule for repo connection details enforced both client- and server-side). New `IsConfigured` computed property on `ProjectRepository` exposed through `ProjectRepositoryResult`/`ProjectRepositoryResponse`. New `Errors.GitRouting.RepositorySlotNotConfigured` guards `RepositoryTargetResolver` so unconfigured slots can't be pushed to. Frontend wizard lives under `src/Front/src/app/features/projects/create-project-wizard/` (5 step components + `create-project-wizard-draft.service.ts` persisting in `sessionStorage` key `ifs:create-project-draft`, debounced). Quick Start button pre-fills defaults and jumps to Review. Resume-draft banner on reopen, Esc/X intercepted with abandon-confirm when draft is non-empty. Both `home.component.ts` and `projects.component.ts` open the new wizard (720px / 90vh / `ifs-wizard-dialog` / `disableClose: true`). Old `home/create-project-dialog/` deleted. New i18n namespace `PROJECT_CREATE.*` in EN/FR. No EF migration needed (snapshot already had nullable columns). Validation: `dotnet build .\InfraFlowSculptor.slnx` (0 errors), `npm run typecheck` + `npm run build` from `src/Front` (0 errors, only pre-existing OTel CommonJS + budget warnings). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | In `project-detail` split generation mode, the panel no longer exposes a close/hide action. The only remaining control is a collapse/expand button rendered directly in the `SplitInfraCode` Infra/Code header (`split-generation-switcher`), so collapsing hides the content while keeping the split header visible. Non-split project generation keeps a single collapse button only. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build` (passes; existing frontend budget/CommonJS warnings unchanged). GitNexus impact stayed `LOW` on `SplitGenerationSwitcherComponent` and `ProjectDetailComponent`. |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | Extracted the 10-step Azure DevOps bootstrap setup guide (Prepare → Run → Permissions → Finalize) into a new standalone `BootstrapSetupGuideComponent` (`src/Front/src/app/features/project-detail/bootstrap-setup-guide/`). The guide is now also rendered in the SplitInfraCode `split-generation-switcher` Bootstrap tab so the explanatory text is visible regardless of the layout preset. The pre-existing inline copy in `project-detail.component.html` (AllInOne flow) is unchanged. Component is i18n-driven (no inputs), uses `MatIconModule`, scoped SCSS imported via `@use "scss/main" as *;`. Validation: `npm run typecheck` + `npm run build` (only pre-existing OTel CommonJS warnings). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | The visible "Generation Results" title was removed from the config/project generation panels, and the new panel-action controls are now anchored directly in the top-right corner of each panel instead of sharing a text header row. Validation: `npm run build` (passes; existing frontend budget/CommonJS warnings unchanged). GitNexus impact remained `LOW` on the touched feature files. |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | Bootstrap pipeline generation is now split-aware in `LayoutPresetEnum.SplitInfraCode`. New `BootstrapMode` enum (`FullOwner`/`ApplicationOnly`) drives `BootstrapPipelineGenerationEngine`: the infra-side bootstrap remains the unique owner of project-level shared resources (environments + variable groups), the code-side bootstrap only validates them and provisions application pipeline definitions (with a `dependsOn: ValidateSharedResources` job). New `ArtifactKind.BootstrapApplication` is routed to the application-code repo by `RepositoryTargetResolver`. `GenerateProjectBootstrapPipelineCommandHandler` now produces two artifact buckets (`infra/`, `app/`) under the same `bootstrap/project/{id}/{ts}/` blob prefix and the response (`GenerateProjectBootstrapPipelineResult` / `GenerateProjectBootstrapPipelineResponse`) exposes `InfraFileUris`+`AppFileUris` while keeping `FileUris` as a backward-compatible union. `PushProjectBootstrapPipelineToGitCommandHandler` filters to the `infra/` bucket in split mode; `PushProjectArtifactsToMultiRepoCommandHandler` adds the `app/` bootstrap to the code repo push scope. Frontend `split-generation-switcher` now renders a Bootstrap tree under both Infra and Code outer tabs and unlocks `Push code` when an app bootstrap is present. New i18n keys `PROJECT_DETAIL.GENERATION.TAB_BOOTSTRAP_APP` and `SWITCHER.BOOTSTRAP_APP_INFO` (EN/FR), `BOOTSTRAP_INFO`/`INFRA_PUSH_DESC`/`CODE_PUSH_DESC` updated. Validation: `dotnet build` (API + parity tests, 0 errors), `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build` (existing pre-existing budget/CommonJS warnings unchanged). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | `SplitInfraCode` project generation now exposes two dedicated Git push actions in the frontend: one for infra artifacts and one for code pipelines. The split push dialog supports `infra`, `code`, or `both` modes, the old mono-repo toolbar push CTA is hidden for split layouts, and `POST /projects/{id}/push-multi-repo-artifacts-to-git` now accepts either target independently while still supporting the dual push flow. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build`, targeted IDE error scan on edited backend/frontend files. Full .NET build remained blocked by existing environment/repo-wide issues (`MSB4006` circular dependency after avoiding locked outputs). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | The generation-panel header actions were visually redesigned with a new shared DS control `app-ds-panel-action-button` instead of raw local buttons: collapse/expand now uses a pressed accent state plus cleaner arrow icons, close uses a themed danger action, and both are grouped in glassy header clusters tuned separately for dark (`config-detail`) and light (`project-detail`) surfaces. Validation: `npm run build` (passes; existing bundle/style budget and OpenTelemetry CommonJS warnings unchanged). GitNexus reports `LOW` impact on the two feature files; the DS barrel export itself appears `CRITICAL` at file level because many files import `shared/components/ds/index.ts`, but the change is additive and compiled successfully. |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | Local `fb8699ea` snapshot rows in `infraDb` were refreshed so both Container Apps now carry their expected assigned user-managed identities and the API Key Vault app setting was restored to `JwtSettings__Secret` / `jwt-secret`, matching current Bicep generation and ASP.NET config binding expectations. Validation: targeted PostgreSQL queries against the local Aspire `postgres:17.6` container before and after the transaction. |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | `config-detail` and `project-detail` generation panels now expose a dedicated collapse/expand control beside the existing close action, keep the header visible while folded, and auto-expand again on fresh Bicep/Pipeline/Bootstrap generations. Validation: `npm run typecheck`; `gitnexus_detect_changes` reported unrelated pre-existing unstaged backend changes in the worktree, so repo-wide risk stayed `medium`. |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | Dream orchestration now uses an exclusive temp-directory lock and skips already-closed same-day dream gates to prevent concurrent memory rewrites; frontend auth-expiry UX was also hardened so `AxiosService` redirects both backend `401` responses and pre-request token acquisition failures to `/login` without flashing component-level errors. Validation: targeted instruction diff review, `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build`, `gitnexus_detect_changes` (risk `low`, no affected processes). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | `config-detail` multi-repo Git setup now matches the project-level layout/repository visual language: `AllInOne` / `SplitInfraCode` use the same preset-card selector and repo-card/slot-empty surfaces, and sub-mode changes update optimistically so the click has immediate visible feedback before the refetch completes. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build` (existing bundle/style budget warnings only). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | `config-detail` now renders the configuration-level `Git` tab only for `MultiRepo` projects; `SplitInfraCode` keeps generation and push flows but no longer shows the per-config repository-management tab. Validation: `npm run typecheck`. |
| 2026-04-24 | dev | Frontend moved to Angular 21 and completed the main Design System rollout: global Material theming, DS buttons/toggles/form controls, `cdkConnectedOverlay` select panels, ACA health-probe card polish, warning cleanup, and broad DS migrations across dialogs, wizards, `resource-edit`, `config-detail`, and `project-detail`. Project-level SplitInfraCode generation was then realigned to restore `Common/` for Bicep and `.azuredevops/Common/...` for pipelines, with matching bootstrap and frontend tree updates. Validation covered `dotnet build` on Application, parity `dotnet test`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run build` (same bundle/style budget warnings). |
| 2026-04-23 | dev/copilot | Major multi-repo + generation wave: backend audit fixes (path traversal guard, auth on generation/download, security headers, HSTS, rate limiting, validator sweep, `ValidationBehavior` cleanup, unique role-assignment index, KeyVault FK `SetNull`), layout-driven repository topology (`LayoutPreset`, per-config `LayoutMode`/`InfraConfigRepository`), removal of legacy `GitRepositoryConfiguration` / `RepositoryMode` / `CommonsStrategy` / `RepositoryBinding`, SplitInfraCode dual-repo generation/push and flat Bicep layout, bootstrap ADO pipelines/environments/permissions guidance, many Bicep/pipeline correctness fixes (RBAC grouping and service category, constants union, KV secret ordering, mono-repo PR `Common` checkout, app pipeline split/promote flows, path normalization), frontend multi-repo switcher/push dialog/i18n/storage/SQL/ACR/custom-domain refinements, the local DB repair script, and the ACR RBAC deployment prerequisite note. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | Custom domains were implemented end to end; bootstrap Azure DevOps was hardened and documented; mono-repo combined push, existing-resource generation verification, pipeline variable usage fixes, Container App health probes and grouped Bicep parameters, CAE Log Analytics security hardening, DNS-based name availability, resource abbreviation overrides, SQL Server fixes, favicon refresh, snapshot seeding, and Aspire updates all landed. |
| 2026-04-21 | copilot | Bicep generation hardening added secure parameter support, pipeline override wiring, output symbol validation, LAW fallback logic, artifact path sanitization, and module reference disambiguation. |
| 2026-04-20 | copilot | Infra release artifact flow was standardized around `drop` and artifact-relative paths, and the Aspire MCP detection mismatch was documented. |
| 2026-04-17 | copilot | `.bicepparam` files switched to environment short names for filenames while keeping full environment names inside the file payload. |
| 2026-04-16 | copilot | Cross-cutting platform alignment landed: sealed enum value objects, string DTO ids, `.ProducesProblem(401)`, tag limits, shared role-assignment domain service, repository naming cleanup, camelCase Bicep identifiers, ErrorOr handling alignment, and Aspire decoupling of API DbContext/OTel/health wiring. |
| 2026-04-15 | copilot | `main` was merged into the DDD branch, concrete `AzureResource` aggregates were sealed, and audit automation plus GitHub audit issues were refreshed. |
| 2026-04-14 | copilot | Audit automation gained Windows-friendly PowerShell entry points, UTF-8 reads, and no longer requires PowerShell 7. |
| 2026-04-13 | copilot | Draw.io architecture tooling was added and the main architecture diagram was refreshed. |
| 2026-04-04 | copilot | Generation/pipeline stabilization fixed Azure DevOps release issues, unified app pipeline generation into `POST /generate-pipeline`, moved `AgentPoolName` to `Project`, refactored `BicepAssembler`, and corrected FK cascade behavior. |
| 2026-04-03 | copilot | App pipeline generation, GitNexus integration, and several Container App runtime/pipeline fixes landed. |
| 2026-04-02 | copilot | The assigned user-managed identity flow was refactored across domain, CQRS, Bicep, frontend, and diagnostics. |
| 2026-04-01 | copilot | Windows-first conventions were reinforced and general-config i18n/runtime issues were cleaned up. |
